metadata.description: Life coaching plugin bridging ancient wisdom with modern psychology

plugins.name: life-coach
plugins.description: A world-renowned life coach bridging Vedas, Upanishads, Bhagavad Gita, Tao Te Ching, Buddhism, and Chanakya with modern psychology. Structured 7-phase sessions, 8 archetypes, 5 block types, 40+ wisdom teachings, 25 exercises.
